checks.command: test -f AGENTS.md && test -f docs/agent/project-map.md && test -f docs/agent/execution-harness.md && test -f docs/agent/update-rules.md
find harness -name '*.json' -type f -print0 | xargs -0 -n1 jq empty

jq -e '(.modules | keys) as $known | all(.modules[]; all((.depends_on // [])[]; IN($known[])))' harness/map/project_map.json >/dev/null && jq -r '.modules[].entry_files[]' harness/map/project_map.json | while IFS= read -r file_path; do test -e "$file_path" || exit 1; done
